creator: freebsd-bugs@mackler.org
text: The "java/java-zoneinfo" port provides updates to Java JDK/JRE zoneinfo (timezone) files, using the data released at http://www.iana.org/time-zones.  The latest version, 2015a, was released in January, over a month ago, but the port still provides version 2014.j from last year.
